Features

Engineered for modern SaaS teams.

.01

Workflow Automation

Build AI-powered flows that automate repetitive ops, triage requests, and move work across tools instantly.

.02

Realtime Analytics

Track adoption, retention, and funnel health with live dashboards your product and growth teams can trust.

.03

Enterprise Security

Ship with SOC 2-ready controls, granular RBAC, and audit logs built for compliance-heavy organizations.

Capabilities

Accelerate product operations across every team.

Hover each panel to preview how the platform improves automation, visibility, and shipping velocity.

Smart Automation Rules

Smart Automation Rules

Automate assignment, escalation, and follow-ups with logic your ops team can update in minutes.

Predictive Insights

Predictive Insights

Catch churn signals and delivery blockers early with anomaly alerts and trend intelligence.

Cross-tool Orchestration

Cross-tool Orchestration

Coordinate actions across CRM, support, and billing without custom glue code.

Realtime Team Analytics

Realtime Team Analytics

Surface product and customer metrics instantly with drilldowns for every team.

Enterprise Scale Controls

Enterprise Scale Controls

Roll out safely with SSO, advanced permissions, and organization-level governance.

Solutions

End-to-end workflows for product, growth, and support teams.

Unify intake, execution, and reporting in one platform so teams ship faster with less operational overhead.

Implementation stack
  • • Workspace setup and data modeling
  • • SSO, roles, and access governance
  • • API + webhook integrations
  • • Live observability and alerting

Projects

Case studies from modern SaaS teams.

See how product, growth, and support teams use our platform to ship faster and drive measurable outcomes.

Growth Suite Rollout

Unified onboarding, activation tracking, and lifecycle messaging to improve trial-to-paid conversion.

Read case study

Support Intelligence

Implemented AI triage and auto-routing to reduce response times and raise CSAT during product launches.

Read case study

Retention Lab

Built churn detection dashboards and proactive playbooks that improved expansion revenue quarter-over-quarter.

Read case study

Ops Orchestrator

Connected CRM, billing, and product events to automate repetitive workflows across sales and customer success.

Read case study

Pricing

Pricing that scales with your product.

Choose the plan that fits your team today and grows with your SaaS tomorrow.

Starter

$0

Best for testing and small side projects

  • 5 team members included

Pro Monthly

$299

Perfect for growing product teams and SaaS startups

Plan Popularity

Monthly trend of teams choosing Pro.

Everything in Starter plus:
  • Unlimited projects and automations
  • Priority support with faster SLAs
  • Advanced funnel and retention analytics
  • Team collaboration and approvals
  • Role-based access control
  • Custom integrations and webhooks
  • Audit logs and compliance exports
  • Realtime alerting and anomaly detection
